title: Klosterneuburg, Lower Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Klosterneuburg, Lower Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Klosterneuburg is a city in Lower Austria with a population of 27,500. A historic town on the Danube near Vienna, dominated by the magnificent Augustinian Klosterneuburg Monastery with its famous Verdun Altar.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
